Description: The top-class WRC+ (RC1), now anticipating NGRC1, equipped with an H4DPA 1.6 L inline-4 engine, a 2.5-bar anti-lag turbo with a 36 mm restrictor, an active center differential, and a 6-speed sequential transmission. After development, the 2021 generation features multiple VO parts for different situations. Gravel spec provides over 300 mm of suspension travel and 300 mm brake discs.
